title: Crazily Optimized
description: Optimized. Beautiful. Minimal. The best Minecraft experience in one modpack.
body:
![FPS+ crazily optimized icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dXoOMf1G/images/e0eb72b3c10ebcb8e91cce681c87dfb8e7123d87.png)
# About Crazily Optimized
**Crazily Optimized** is a lightweight, optimized Fabric-based modpack designed to enhance your Minecraft experience with stunning visuals, seamless textures, and quality-of-life improvements — all while maintaining excellent performance.

# Features
✅ **Enhanced Visuals** – Stunning shaders, connected textures, and refined models. Customize your look easily with in-game shader and texture access!

✅ **Optimized Gameplay** – Smooth mouse controls and extremely optimized performance.

✅ **Minimalist Approach** – Under 50 carefully-chosen mods for maximum efficiency.

✅ **Broad Compatibility** – Supports Minecraft 1.21+ and works with:

- 🟢 Windows
- 🟢 Debian-based Linux Distros
- 🟢 Modrinth App
- 🟢 Prism Launcher
- 🟢 ATLauncher

Always use the latest **Crazily Optimized** version for the best experience.

# Installation (Modrinth App)
1. **Download & Install** the [Modrinth app](https://modrinth.com/app).
2. **Login** with your Minecraft account.
3. **Browse** on the left sidebar.
4. **Search** for Crazily Optimized.
5. **Download & Install** the first result.

# License
This modpack, Crazily Optimized, may NOT be:
- Reuploaded anywhere
- Forked, altered, or redistributed
- Used as a base for other modpacks
- Used to take assets (textures, sounds, configs, etc.)
- Given a confusingly similar name or branding
